title: formations — published events
description: Formations + tactical set-pieces. Sport-specific (soccer 4-3-3, basketball zone defense, etc.). Coach-owned + shared within team.

events.name: FormationCreated
events.trigger: New Formation row. Tactical layout with player positions.

events.name: FormationAppliedToMatch
events.trigger: Formation selected for a match's starting lineup.

events.name: FormationRevisioned
events.trigger: New version of an existing formation (tactical evolution).

events.name: SetPieceCreated
events.trigger: New SetPiece row (corner-kick play, penalty routine, timeout play).
